patch.value: Auto-route pm update --status closed --close-reason to pm close (telemetry: 248 hits/30d)

Telemetry analysis (scripts/prod/telemetry/query-telemetry.sh, 2026-05-17) shows close_through_update fires 248 times in 30 days — agents routinely write `pm update <id> --status closed --close-reason "..."` and bounce off the validation guard.

Current behavior: src/cli/commands/update.ts:1530 throws PmCliError with helpful guidance, but agent has to retry.

Proposed behavior: when update is called with --status closed AND --close-reason, internally invoke runClose() with the same author/message/reason. Emit a telemetry hint event so we can track the auto-route. Keep the hard error only when --close-reason is absent (so we still nudge proper usage when reason is missing).

Acceptance: existing test for close_through_update still asserts the bare path errors; new test asserts the auto-route path succeeds with metadata.close_reason set and history records both messages.

Implemented pm-12ib: pm update --status closed --close-reason <text> now auto-routes to pm close, returning success with warnings:['auto_routed_from_update_to_close']. Mixed updates (status+close-reason + other fields) still rejected with helpful guidance. Tests added. Reduces 248 hits/30d.
